creator: Mojang
description: This is Minecraft 1.14.4 configured to run independently. Nothing is installed, and the program just runs from a USB Drive. USB 3.0 (5gb/s) is recommended. This game cannot be updated from 1.14.4. Tested virus free with System Mechanic Ultimate Defense System Shield and Malware Killer . Also tested with VirusTotal . Download and unzip to a USB drive. Untested on Mac computers, but should work on Windows 7 and above. Further instruction are in a text file (in the zip file) that explain how to run game. Optifine has been installed as well, and the SILDURS Extreme VL shader pack is included (performance may vary). Minecraft 1.5 is also included.
